# Version 3.119.4
> **Servicing update** · Released May 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.4) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)
> **Supersedes [3.119.3](3.119.3.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.4/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.4 ships 22 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

- **Public API surface changed** — The linked API-diff report for 3.119.4 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

## Engine

- **Libpng to 1.6.54** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452))
- **Skia submodule to point to squashed commit** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3474](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3474))
- **Libwebp to 1.6.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478))
- **Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496))
- **Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502))
- **SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 using GirCore.Gtk-4.0 bindings** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3527))
- **Libpng to 1.6.58** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3723](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3723))

- **API guidelines and implement-issue skill** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3445](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3445))

## Bug Fixes

- **Brotli to 1.2.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469))
- **AoT crash when IlcDisableReflection=true** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **To .NET 10 SDK with workload version set pinning** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514))
- **Cairo assertion crash in GTK4 SKDrawingArea** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3562](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3562))
- **SKManagedStream: replace parent/child chain with SKData snapshot** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3589](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3589))
- **RollForward from latestPatch to latestFeature** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3624))
- **Delay-load D3D12 DLLs to prevent crashes on systems without DX12** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3633](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3633))

- **Loongarch Linux build mapping** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3648](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3648))
- **Split Tizen native CI into per-architecture jobs** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3672](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3672))

## Preview 1 (April 22, 2026)

Preview 1 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Linux ARM64 crash: add fontconfig runtime library to cross-compile sysroot; AoT crash when IlcDisableReflection=true; libwebp to 1.6.0; skia submodule to point to squashed commit; brotli to 1.2.0; unused deps and add deps docs; libpng to 1.6.54; API guidelines and implement-issue skill.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.3-preview.1.1...v3.119.4-preview.1.1)

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

Preview 1 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Linux ARM64 crash: add fontconfig runtime library to cross-compile sysroot; AoT crash when IlcDisableReflection=true; libwebp to 1.6.0; skia submodule to point to squashed commit; brotli to 1.2.0; unused deps and add deps docs; libpng to 1.6.54; API guidelines and implement-issue skill.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
